title: OpenSEO
description: An open-source alternative to Ahrefs, helping startup founders manage and optimize their SEO strategy without the high price tag of traditional platforms.

title: Kobbe
description: Privacy-friendly web analytics that combine traffic and revenue tracking, giving founders a clear picture of their funnel without compromising user privacy.

title: Rewisp — an ambient memory for your Mac
description: An AI-powered utility for Mac that acts as an ambient memory assistant, allowing founders to recall and query any information they've previously seen on their screens.

title: BaseRT - Apple M5 Optimized
description: An AI inference runtime optimized for Apple M5 chips that delivers speeds significantly faster than llama.cpp, accelerating local AI development and deployment.

title: Searchable field-level encryption on Supabase with CipherStash
description: A technical guide on implementing secure, searchable field-level database encryption, essential for startups handling sensitive user data.

title: Mirage
description: Turn your SaaS into a clickable, interactive demo in just 90 seconds to boost product-led growth and user sign-ups.

title: OpenMarkdown
description: A collaborative markdown editor that enables seamless co-editing between human founders and AI agents to streamline documentation.

title: ZooData
description: A dedicated data layer for AI agents, allowing developers to build more robust, stable, and context-aware AI-driven products.

title: LiveDemo
description: A budget-friendly, open-source alternative to Storylane and Arcade, helping founders build interactive product tours without recurring fees.

title: Acebuilder
description: Build high-converting landing pages quickly using Aceternity UI components, significantly speeding up your MVP launch.

title: DocuSmart AI
description: Consolidate your startup's scattered company knowledge and internal documents into a unified, AI-searchable repository.

title: Transcribe.cpp
description: A fast, lightweight local audio transcription utility that allows founders to process voice data securely without paying for cloud APIs.

title: Moonshine Micro
description: An ultra-lightweight speech recognition and TTS framework under 500kb, enabling developers to build fast, local voice features into their apps.
